subject: LU-10277 utils: 'lfs mkdir -i -1' pick the less full MDTs

values.-1: I would prefer that you didn't submit this
values.+1: Looks good to me, but someone else must approve

Patch Set 2: Code-Review-1

(4 comments)

This also needs an update to the lfs-setdirstripe.1 man page so that users know "-1" is a useful stripe index, with a warning that it isn't able to do effective load balancing for many directores created at the same time.

Should it?  One possibility to add in a later patch is if we are below qos_threshold of space/inode differences between MDTs (ie. not imbalnced) that the mkdir MDT selection could be round robin?

parents.subject: LU-9019 obd: migrate upcall cache to time64_t

commit.subject: LU-10277 utils: 'lfs mkdir -i -1' pick the less full MDTs
commit.message:
LU-10277 utils: 'lfs mkdir -i -1' pick the less full MDTs

If 'lfs mkdir -i -1 -c count' is specified, it will 'df' first,
and then randomly pick 'count' less full MDTs as specific MDTs.

Add sanity test 413.
